perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman in a beige bucket hat and a white puff-sleeve dress stands in a Costco store, excitedly gesturing at packages of pastries. (2) She picks up a package of 'Mini Maple Pecan Pastries' and holds it close to the lens. (3) The scene cuts to two women sitting at a dining table at home with the same pastries on a pink heart-shaped plate. (4) One woman bites into the pastry and reacts with wide eyes and a smile, while the other woman gives a thumbs up and points at the food.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, high-pitched female vocals speak enthusiastically over an upbeat, mid-tempo electronic BGM. (2) Occasional ambient store noise including the clinking of shopping carts is heard. (3) The audio switches to a home-recorded dialogue where two female voices discuss the food's texture and flavor. (4) Sounds of satisfaction such as 'Mmm' and exaggerated chewing noises are audible at the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Subtitles translate the spoken Chinese dialogue throughout the video. (2) Hook Text: '隱藏版' (Hidden Version), '很難搶' (Hard to catch), and '迷你楓糖胡桃酥' (Mini Maple Pecan Pastry) appear in bold, colorful fonts. (3) Effect Text: '超級無敵好吃' (Super invincible delicious) and '加熱之後更好吃' (Tastes better after heating) appear during the tasting segment.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro at store -> Product demonstration -> Tasting and review at home

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators, 1 male passer-by, 1 child in the background at the store
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long dark hair and wears a beige hat with a white dress; another has long dark hair and wears a white frilly top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The store background shows warehouse shelves, shopping carts, and umbrellas. The home background shows a dining table, a kitchen counter, and plush toys.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Product Demo -> Tasting -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to provide a positive review of a specific Costco pastry, highlighting its popularity and flavor to encourage viewers to purchase it.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed showing of the product, price, and enthusiastic positive feedback.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy presentation with rapid-fire speech and variety-show style text graphics.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The shift from the store to the home environment creates a sense of authenticity, showing the 'haul' being consumed.
